name: @bolthub/pay
description: Charge for an MCP tool or HTTP endpoint in a few lines — rail-agnostic (L402 today, x402 next) payments for AI-agent tool calls

scripts.build: rm -rf dist tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap=inline && cp dist/index.js dist/index.mjs && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap=inline && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --declaration --project tsconfig.build.json
